caption: The video captures a man playing basketball in an indoor gymnasium. He is seen running across the court, holding a basketball in his right hand. The gym has a polished wooden floor with blue and yellow markings, and there are two basketball hoops on either side of the court. The walls are painted white with a blue lower section, and there are bleachers on the left side of the frame. The man appears to be practicing his shots or drills, moving with purpose and focus. The environment is well-lit, suggesting it might be daytime or that the gym has good artificial lighting. The overall scene conveys a sense of active engagement in sports and physical activity.
